steps.t: Durin has asked you to climb from the depths and return to Zul-mazal, where you can begin gathering the dwarves for Dwarrowmoot.
Durin asked you to bring word to a number of dwarves about the upcoming Dwarrowmoot: Bósi, Bróin, or Bori at Zul-mazal. Prince Ingór at Maergrind in M…
Durin has called for Dwarrowmoot on the south-eastern side of the Thing-fold, in the Welkin-lofts.
Durin is at the Thing-fold in the Welkin-lofts for Dwarrowmoot, but is disappointed that more dwarves have not already arrived.
Your efforts have enabled more dwarves to arrive for the Dwarrowmoot. Durin is eager to begin.
